title: thymus polytrichus subsp. britannicus
intro: Thymus polytrichus subsp. britannicus, also known as British thyme or Welsh thyme, is a subspecies of the Thymus polytrichus plant, a perennial herb native to Europe. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial and antiseptic properties, which have been shown to aid in wound healing and the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of Thymus polytrichus subsp. britannicus include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
